title: Physics Compilation
description: A modpack for easy use of vs and its addons
body:
This modpack aims to make installing [Valkyrien Skies](https://www.valkyrienskies.org/home) and its addons easier.

All addons are picked from [this page](https://wiki.valkyrienskies.org/wiki/List_of_addons) and most of them are here.

Somes basic optimizations mods are included to make the game run better since [Valkyrien Skies](https://www.valkyrienskies.org/home) can sometimes be hard to run on pc's

([Clockwork Aditions](https://github.com/GuyApooye/ClockworkAdditions?tab=MIT-1-ov-file#readme) needs to be linked since it's an external mod)
